text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
CODEBOOK: Encounter Records RIFs │ May 2025 │ V 1.7 3 

AT_PHYSN_TXNMY_CD 

LABEL: Claim Attending Physician Taxonomy Code 

DESCRIPTION: The health care provider taxonomy (HCPT) code used to indicate the attending provider's specialty. 
This is a unique identifier for a classification of health care specialty at a specialized level of defined 
medical activity within a medical field as created by the National Uniform Claim Committee
